zh.lifeSummary: Peeter Greene於1600年出生。他於1640年與Katherine Baker在英國英格蘭倫敦斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1665年11月17日在美國維吉尼亞州史密斯享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Peeter Greene于1600年出生。他于1640年与Katherine Baker在英国英格兰倫敦斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1665年11月17日在美国弗吉尼亚州史密斯享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Greene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Green  . In North America, this surname has assimilated cognates from other languages.

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Peeter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Peeter Greene was born in 1600. He married Katherine Baker in 1640, in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 17 November 1665, in Smyth, Virginia, United States, at the age of 65.

ko.lifeSummary: Peeter Greene(은)는 1600년 태어났다. 그는 1640년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치에서 Katherine Baker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1665년 11월 17일 미국 버지니아 주 스미스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Peeter Greene родился в 1600 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Baker в 1640 г. в местности сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 17 ноября 1665 г. в местности смит, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 65 лет.
